data.title: Japan Strengthens Five-Year Plan to Support Innovation
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Japanese Prime Minister Shigeru Ishiba announced at WebX Asia 2025 that the Japanese government is intensifying its 'Five-Year Startup Development Plan' to further support innovative technologies. This initiative focuses on Web3, artificial intelligence (AI), the digital industry, the creative industry, and the transformative application of AI in manufacturing, agriculture, and fisheries.

During the upcoming Osaka Kansai Expo, Web3 technology will be practically applied to promote its potential for social experimentation and innovation. Ishiba emphasized that future history books will mark the 2020s as the beginning of a new industrial revolution, with Web3 and AI as the core technologies driving this change.

data.title: Pudgy Penguins Projects Record Revenue and Future Public Listing
data.description: According to PANews, Pudgy Penguins CEO Luca Netz revealed in an interview that the company anticipates achieving a record revenue of $50 million this year. Netz expressed aspirations for Pudgy Penguins' stock to be publicly traded by 2027. He noted that the timeline for going public is contingent on the company's revenue growth, stating, "If we don't go public within the next two years, I will be disappointed in myself."

data.title: SOL's Performance Against ETH and BTC Expected to Strengthen
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Chris Burniske, former head of crypto at Ark Invest and current partner at Placeholder VC, has commented on the ongoing performance of SOL against ETH and BTC. Despite SOL's recent lack of favor in terms of market sentiment and commentary, Burniske anticipates that the positive trend in SOL's exchange rates with ETH and BTC will continue to strengthen in the coming weeks.

data.title: Metaplanet Included in FTSE Japan Index Following September Evaluation
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Simon Gerovich, CEO of the Japanese publicly listed company Metaplanet, announced on social media that Metaplanet has been included in the FTSE Japan Index following its evaluation in September.

The FTSE Japan Index, managed by FTSE Russell, serves as a tool for tracking and benchmarking investments in the Japanese stock market.

data.title: Whale Converts Ethereum Holdings to USDT, Profits $51.7 Million
data.description:
According to PANews, a significant cryptocurrency whale or institution has recently sold its remaining Ethereum (ETH) holdings, totaling 10,425 ETH, in exchange for approximately 49.737 million USDT over the past 13 hours. This entity initially purchased ETH in July and sold it in August, transforming 98.33 million USDT into 150 million USDT.

In June, the whale or institution transferred 98.33 million USDT from TRX to ETH using ten different addresses. On July 14, they invested heavily by acquiring 33,333 ETH at an average price of $2,950.

After holding ETH for a month, the whale or institution began selling its ETH holdings. The sale was completed early today at an average price of approximately $4,555 per ETH. This strategic investment in ETH resulted in a profit of $51.7 million, effectively converting 98.33 million USDT into 150 million USDT.

data.title: Hong Kong to Implement New Crypto Asset Banking Regulations in 2026
data.description:
According to PANews, the Hong Kong Monetary Authority has issued a circular announcing the full implementation of new banking capital regulations based on the Basel Committee on Banking Supervision's crypto asset standards, effective January 1, 2026.

In an interview with Caixin, Faith, a partner at King & Wood Mallesons and a lecturer at the University of Hong Kong's Faculty of Law, explained that the new regulations set a maximum risk weight of 1250% for crypto asset exposures using permissionless blockchain technology. This means banks must hold capital equivalent to at least a 1:1 ratio for these crypto asset exposures. Such stringent capital requirements are expected to deter many banks from holding these types of crypto assets.

data.title: Philippines to Consider Strategic Bitcoin Reserve With 20-Year Lockup
data.description:
The bill proposes terms for how the country's central bank could be tasked with buying Bitcoin and locking the holdings for two decades.
source: https://decrypt.co/336611/philippines-to-consider-strategic-bitcoin-reserve-with-20-year-lockup

data.title: Hong Kong Cryptocurrency ETFs Surge Over 9% in Market Rally
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Hong Kong's cryptocurrency ETFs and related stocks experienced a significant surge on August 25. The Bosera Ethereum ETF, Harvest Ethereum ETF, ChinaAMC Ethereum ETF, and FA Southern Ethereum ETF all saw increases of over 9%. Additionally, Huaxing Capital Holdings rose by more than 10%, while Huajian Medical, Boyaa Interactive, and OKG Technology gained over 5%.

data.title: Ondo Finance Emerges as Major Tokenized Fund Issuer
data.description: According to Foresight News, data from Token Terminal reveals that as of July 2025, Ondo Finance has become the second-largest issuer of tokenized funds, following BlackRock.

data.title: Bitlayer (BTR) Will Be Available on Binance Alpha and Binance Futures
data.description: Binance announce that Bitlayer (BTR) will open for trading on Binance Alpha starting 2025-08-27 10:00 (UTC). In addition, Binance Futures will launch BTRUSDT Perpetual Contract with up to 50x leverage at 2025-08-27 10:30 (UTC).

data.title: Heritage Distilling Completes PIPE Financing and Launches IP Buyback Plan
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, Heritage Distilling, a Nasdaq-listed company, has successfully completed its PIPE financing. The company has established a treasury strategy centered around intellectual property (IP).

The Story Foundation has committed to initiating an $82 million IP buyback program in the public market. This buyback will take place over a 90-day period, starting from August 15 and concluding on November 16. Updates on the progress will be regularly communicated to the community.

data.title: Telegram founder claims case is baseless and criticizes French government
data.description:
Pavel Durov says French investigators found no proof he or Telegram did anything wrong.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/telegram-founder-claims-case-is-baseless/

data.title: Crypto Trader Faces Partial Liquidation on DOGE Position
data.description: According to Foresight News, monitoring by Onchain Lens has revealed that cryptocurrency trader James Wynn experienced a partial liquidation of his 10x leveraged long position on DOGE.

data.title: Ethereum Trader Adjusts Position Amid Market Volatility
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, on-chain analyst Yu Jin observed a recent rapid decline in Ethereum's price, prompting a trader with a $125,000 leveraged long position on ETH to take precautionary measures. Concerned about the liquidation price of $4,668, the trader closed 2,000 ETH just a few dollars above this threshold, effectively lowering the liquidation price by $10 to $4,658.

The trader's position, backed by a $740,000 margin, still holds 23,100 ETH, valued at approximately $108 million. The position currently shows an unrealized profit of $2.63 million.

data.title: Stablecoins Hold Nearly $200 Billion in U.S. Treasury Securities
data.description: According to PANews, Bitwise Asset Management has released data indicating that as of March 31, stablecoins held U.S. Treasury securities valued at just under $200 billion. This positions them as the 17th largest holder of these securities.

data.title: Unknown Hacker Profits $2.04 Million from Ethereum Trade
data.description: According to Foresight News, an unidentified hacker has reportedly sold 5,001 ETH, which they purchased four days ago, making a profit of approximately $2.04 million. The hacker initially bought the Ethereum on August 21, 2025, using 21.76 million DAI at a price of $4,352 per ETH. Four hours ago, they sold the entire amount for 23.80 million DAI, at a selling price of $4,760 per ETH. This trading activity resulted in a profit of about $2.04 million. The hacker currently holds approximately $46.13 million in funds.
